syntax_14237.creator: eindreistiger
syntax_14237.title: Velocity
syntax_14237.description:
This Adds the Velocity Effect.
The First %entity% expression is to call out, who will the Velocity apply to.
the Second %entity% or %location% can be used towards/away from an entity or any location.
Vector is simple 0, 1, 0 is to push up
syntax_14237.syntax_pattern:
set velocity of %entity% to (north|south|east|west|up|down|forward|backward|left|right) [at speed %number%]
set velocity of %entity% towards (%entity%|%location%) [at speed %number%]
set velocity of %entity% away from (%entity%|%location%) [at speed %number%]
set velocity of %entity% to vector %number%, %number%, %number% [at speed %number%]

en:
This Adds the Velocity Effect.
The First %entity% expression is to call out, who will the Velocity apply to.
the Second %entity% or %location% can be used towards/away from an entity or any location.
Vector is simple 0, 1, 0 is to push up
